name: Ghetto Brothers
description: The Ghetto Brothers were a gang and music group founded in New York City's South Bronx in the late 1960s. They were involved in politics, particularly the Puerto Rican independence movement, and aimed to uplift young Latino and Black men. The gang spread to much of the Northeastern United States and later merged with the Savage Nomads to form Los Solidos in Connecticut.

sources.title: Ghetto Brothers Organization/Yates Boys Organization - Chicago Gang History
